content: Key architecture decisions made building Jarvis (April 2026): (1) Router ceiling normalization: fixed from hits/10.0 (all scores sub-0.25) to hits/2.0 (1 hit = MEDIUM, 2+ = HIGH). (2) Interview contamination fix: is_interview = routing.primary.module_id == 'interview_intel' only, not OR cfg.interview.mode — the OR was loading 12k tokens of interview context into every single query. (3) InterviewIntel HIGH-confidence guard: only wins primary routing at threshold score, not MEDIUM. (4) General fallback module: explicit catch for score < 0.20 to avoid forcing all low-confidence queries into StrategyOS. (5) MemoryManager signal tightening: phrases not single words, to avoid collision with interview mentions in context. Adjacent insight from LinkedIn: skillful-mcp solves the same problem one layer down — lazy tool discovery instead of loading 80+ schemas upfront. Same pattern as Jarvis's lazy pack loading. 'The harness is the product. The model is a dependency.'
outcome: All decisions implemented. No regressions. Harness syntactically clean.
